title: Ring-LWE and Module-LWE: Efficient Structured Lattice Cryptography
description: Learn how algebraic structure enables efficient lattice-based cryptography. Understand polynomial rings, Ring-LWE, Module-LWE, and why Kyber uses Module-LWE for the optimal balance of efficiency and security.
learningObjectives: Define polynomial rings and their role in cryptography
Explain the Ring-LWE problem and its security foundations
Understand Module-LWE as a generalization bridging LWE and Ring-LWE
Implement efficient polynomial operations using NTT
Compare security-efficiency tradeoffs of LWE variants
Connect these foundations to Kyber's design choices
